## Summary
<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Style/formatting
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Code Quality Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with 0 warnings
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] No `console.log` left in code
- [ ] No hardcoded values (use env vars or constants)
- [ ] Components have meaningful names
- [ ] No unused imports or variables

## Review Checklist (for reviewers)
- [ ] Code is readable and well-structured
- [ ] No security issues (XSS, injection, eval)
- [ ] Edge cases handled (null, empty, error states)
- [ ] UI is responsive and accessible
- [ ] No performance regressions (unnecessary re-renders)

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing done
- [ ] E2E tests pass (`npm run test:e2e`)

## Screenshots (if UI change)
<!-- Add before/after screenshots -->

## Merge Criteria
> All boxes must be checked before merging. Approve only when:
> 1. All CI checks pass (lint + test + build)
> 2. At least 1 reviewer approved
> 3. No unresolved review comments
> 4. Branch is up to date with main
